# Wellness Air

Local-first air-quality MCP for AI agents. v0.1 ships first-class AirGradient support (12,000+ public sensors, no auth required). AirThings, PurpleAir, IQAir AirVisual, and Awair are scaffolded for v0.2.

Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/wellness-air
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/wellness-air
Docs: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/air
Primary command: npx -y wellness-air doctor
MCP command: wellness-air-mcp

Core tools (10):
- air_agent_manifest — runtime contract, tool list, supported clients, env vars
- air_capabilities — providers, metrics, privacy modes
- air_connection_status — health + warnings
- air_privacy_audit — what is logged locally vs sent to providers
- air_data_inventory — metric catalog + AQI band thresholds
- air_current_reading — latest reading (PM2.5, CO2, AQI, temp, humidity)
- air_aqi_check — fast "is the air OK?" with band + recommendation
- air_daily_summary — synthesized daily snapshot
- air_compare_locations — AQI across 2-10 locations
- air_search_public_sensors — AirGradient public map helper

Optional env vars:
- WELLNESS_AIR_DEFAULT_PROVIDER — airgradient (default), airthings, purpleair, iqair, awair (v0.2)
- WELLNESS_AIR_DEFAULT_LOCATION — provider-specific location id; AirGradient public ids work without auth
- AIRGRADIENT_API_TOKEN — only needed for owned-sensor reads
- AIRGRADIENT_LOCATION_ID — fallback for default location
- AIRTHINGS_CLIENT_ID, AIRTHINGS_CLIENT_SECRET — v0.2
- PURPLEAIR_API_KEY — v0.2
- IQAIR_API_KEY — v0.2
- AWAIR_ACCESS_TOKEN — v0.2
- WELLNESS_AIR_QUIET=1 — suppress the stderr community CTA

Workflow for agents:
1. Call air_connection_status before any provider-backed tool.
2. Use air_current_reading or air_aqi_check for spot questions.
3. Surface AQI band (good/moderate/unhealthy_sensitive/unhealthy/very_unhealthy/hazardous) plus the number.
4. Pair with WHOOP/Oura/Garmin recovery + nourish meal context for cross-cutting wellness coaching.
5. AirGradient public sensors require NO auth — pass a locationId from https://www.airgradient.com/map/.

Safety:
- Public AirGradient locations require no auth; owned sensors use AIRGRADIENT_API_TOKEN.
- All cached data stays under ~/.wellness-air; no third-party telemetry.
- Provider tokens are never returned to the agent.
- AQI band recommendations are heuristic; refer to local public-health agencies for action thresholds.
- Not affiliated with AirGradient, AirThings, PurpleAir, IQAir, or Awair.
